zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory of Scotland於1152年出生在英國蘇格蘭凱特內斯時，她的父親Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria38歲，母親Ada de Warenne32歲。她於1169年與Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus在英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1213年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾薩福崔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory of Scotland于1152年出生在英国苏格兰凱特內斯时，她的父亲Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria38岁，母亲Ada de Warenne32岁。她于1169年与Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus在英国苏格兰安格斯奧特豪斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1213年在英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾薩福崔。

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory of Scotland was born in 1152, in Caithness, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria, was 38 and her mother, Ada de Warenne, was 32. She married Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus in 1169, in Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1213, in Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory of Scotland est née en 1152, à Caithness, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ada de Warenne, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus en 1169, à Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1213, à Forfar, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory of Scotland 1152 in Caithness, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria 38 und ihre Mutter Ada de Warenne 32. Sie hat 1169 in Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1213 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Forfar, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory of Scotland è nata il nel 1152 nel Caithness, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Ada de Warenne, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus nel 1169, nel Auchterhouse, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1213, nel Forfar, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory of Scotlandが1152年にイギリススコットランドケイスネスで生まれた時，父Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbriaは38歳，母Ada de Warenneは32歳であった。1169年にイギリススコットランドアンガスアウチテローウゼでGille Crist 4th Earl of Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1213年にイギリススコットランドアンガスフォーファルで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアサウトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory of Scotland(이)가 1152년 영국 스코틀랜드 케이스네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada de Warenne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1169년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 오트하스에서 Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1213년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 포파르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 사w트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory of Scotland nasceu em 1152, em Caithness, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Warenne, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus em 1169, em Auchterhouse, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1213, em Forfar, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory of Scotland родилась в 1152 г. в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada de Warenne, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus в 1169 г. в местности аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1213 г. в местности форфар, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности савтри, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory of Scotland nació en 1152, en Caithness, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ada de Warenne, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus en 1169, en Auchterhouse, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1213, en Forfar, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
